nasb.text: and Ahishar was over the household; and Adoniram the son of Abda was over the men subject to forced labor.

esv.text: Ahishar was in charge of the palace; and Adoniram the son of Abda was in charge of the forced labor.

cnv.text: 亞希煞作家宰；亞比大的兒子亞多尼蘭掌管服勞役的人。

ccb.text: 亚希煞总管宫廷事务；亚比大的儿子亚多尼兰总管做劳役的。
